entry_condition: SkillGuard needs local self-maintenance control records before implementation checkers are introduced.

evidence.summary: Initial workflow report for self-maintenance setup.

skipped_checks.reason: This workflow only creates control records and does not implement or execute checkers.
skipped_checks.impact: Behavioral claims require future implementation evidence.

residual_risk: Further workflow reports may be needed when implementation assets, fixtures, or checker versions are added.
claim_boundary: This workflow report documents initial self-maintenance setup and does not assert broad project closure. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, or code-contract validation without separate current evidence.
